title: cerastium flavescens
intro: Cerastium flavescens, also known as the yellow mouse-ear, is a flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Russia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cerastium flavescens include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Cerastium flavescens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
